name: Dasmer Singh
bio: Claims he 'barely plays' and still somehow wins everything. Currently on a one-man mission to make the whole office buy him lunch.

name: Alex Chen
bio: Brought a paddle from home on day one. Has watched six YouTube tutorials. Currently 2-8. Very confident about next time.

name: Priya Kapoor
bio: Deceptively good. Lulls opponents into false comfort with a sweet smile, then activates tournament mode. Nobody sees it coming twice.

name: Tom Nakamura
bio: Former college athlete in something completely unrelated. Applies exactly zero of that experience here. Great spin serve though.

name: Sarah Okafor
bio: Joined two months ago. Already top 3. Leadership is simultaneously impressed and mildly threatened.

name: Marcus Webb
bio: Will absolutely pause a meeting to play a match. Has developed a signature serve that works maybe 40% of the time. Commits to it anyway.
